title: Book an appointment from the dedicated booking flow
description: This verifies that a client can choose a barber, service, date, and available time in the booking flow and receive a success confirmation after booking.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a booking success confirmation is visible

title: Sign in and reach the correct area for a client account
description: This verifies that a returning client can log in with email and password and is routed to the client area after authentication.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the client home is displayed

title: Sign in and reach the correct area for a professional account
description: This verifies that a returning professional can log in with email and password and is routed to the professional dashboard after authentication.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the professional dashboard is displayed

title: Create a professional account with an invitation code and land in the professional area
description: This verifies that a new user can register as a professional using an invitation code and is routed to the professional dashboard after signup.

steps.description: Fill in the full name field with Test Professional
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the email field with a unique valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Enter a valid professional invitation code
Verify the professional dashboard is displayed

title: Create a client account and land in the client area
description: This verifies that a new user can register as a client and is routed to the client area after submitting the signup form.

steps.description: Fill in the full name field with Test Client
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the email field with a unique valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the client home is displayed

title: Update and save the professional work schedule
description: This verifies that a professional can change work start time, work end time, and working days and save the updated schedule in profile settings.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated work schedule is displayed in the profile

title: Continue from client home into booking with a service already selected
description: This verifies that a client can start on the home page, choose a service, continue into booking, and see that service carried into the appointment flow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a service on the home page
Verify the selected service is prefilled in the booking flow

title: Prevent selecting an occupied time slot
description: This verifies that a client cannot choose a time slot that is already occupied and that the unavailable slot is blocked in the booking UI.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to select an occupied time slot
Verify the occupied time slot is blocked from selection

title: Access the professional dashboard after signing in
description: This verifies that a professional can open the dashboard and view the day’s schedule after logging in.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the professional dashboard schedule view is displayed

title: Show a friendly error for invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that a user who enters incorrect credentials sees a visible login error and does not reach a protected area.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Persist schedule changes after saving profile settings
description: This verifies that a professional’s saved work schedule remains reflected when revisiting the profile settings view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Change the work start time and working days
Verify the saved schedule remains displayed

title: Show upcoming availability options while booking
description: This verifies that the booking flow presents upcoming dates and time slots so a client can choose from currently available appointment options.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify upcoming dates and available time slots are displayed

title: Block registration when required fields are left empty
description: This verifies that signup validation prevents account creation when required registration fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Verify registration validation errors are visible
